summary: Full frontend QA of the new marketing site (/, /comment-kolo, /ressources, /a-propos). All 4 pages render correctly with all required data-testid hooks, animations, assets, navigation, and CTAs. Logo marquee runs CSS animation `mktMarquee` (38s) with all 30 images (15 logos x2) loaded. iPhone mockups load HTTP 200. Resources filter + article view + back-to-grid all functional. Mobile burger menu fully working. No regressions on /app-v2 routes or legacy public routes. 0 console errors on the 4 marketing pages.
action_items: OPTIONAL (low priority): On /comment-kolo, the Avant/Après tags are rendered with CSS class `.mkt-tag-before` / `.mkt-tag-after` but lack explicit `data-testid='mkt-tag-before'` and `data-testid='mkt-tag-after'` attributes. The original spec mentions these as data-testid hooks. Visually present and labeled correctly, so functional pass — purely a testability nit. Add `data-testid` if you want future Playwright suites to grab them directly.
critical_code_review_comments: Marketing CSS scope is well-isolated under `.mkt-root` — no risk of leaking into /app-v2.
MarketingLayout's IntersectionObserver useEffect has no dependency array — runs on every render and creates a fresh observer each time. Low-impact but could be tightened with [] dependency.
App.js correctly guards `/` behind Capacitor.isNativePlatform() so iOS native still lands on /app-v2 — verified by code review.
All 4 marketing pages are static (no backend calls), 0 console errors observed.

homepage_/.logo_marquee: 30 images (duplicated track), animation mktMarquee 38s, all loaded

comment_kolo.note: Avant/Après tags rendered visually (red/green chips) but use CSS class only, no data-testid

mobile_responsive_390px.navigation_works: clicking ressources navigates and shows 10 cards

test_credentials: Not required - all 4 marketing pages are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing site refonte (/, /comment-kolo, /ressources, /a-propos) is fully validated and shipping-ready. The only nit is that 'Avant/Après' tags on /comment-kolo use CSS class .mkt-tag-before/.mkt-tag-after instead of explicit data-testid attributes — visual functionality is fine. Assets live under /app/frontend/public/marketing/assets/. APP_STORE_URL constant in MarketingLayout.js. All routes are static, no backend dependency. Native iOS still correctly redirects / to /app-v2 via Capacitor guard in App.js.
